summary: Iteration 207: Inventory XLS Pipeline Backend Testing Complete. All 20 tests passed. Verified full pipeline: classify → parse → stage → update → approve → ledger persistence → learning loop. Key features tested: (1) POST /api/inventory-xls/ingest correctly classifies Open Orders XLS with confidence≥0.9 and column_map.source='heuristic', (2) Dedup detection returns already_staged=true on second upload, (3) Not-inventory files (RFQ.xlsx) return staged=false with classification='not_inventory', (4) Staging list/detail endpoints work with status filters, (5) Update staging assigns customer correctly, (6) Approve without customer returns 422, (7) Approve creates movements in inv_movements with source_type='spreadsheet_import' and reference_type='xls_import', (8) Effective date extracted from filename preserved in movements, (9) Forecast XLS routes to inv_incoming_supply (not inv_movements), (10) Learning loop works - first file uses 'heuristic', second file from same domain uses 'learned', (11) Reject staging sets status=rejected, (12) Learning summary returns aggregations.
critical_code_review_comments: inventory_xls_classifier.py: Clean rule-based classification with filename + header signal matching. Confidence bonus when both match.
inventory_xls_parser.py: Proper cascade (learned→heuristic→LLM) with header_hash for learned mapping lookup. extract_effective_date_from_filename handles YYYY-MM-DD and MM.DD.YY formats.
inventory_xls_staging_service.py: Correct dedup by file_hash+customer, _persist_learning upserts by (sender_domain, header_hash), approve_staging correctly routes forecast to inv_incoming_supply.
inventory_xls router: All endpoints properly wired - ingest, staging CRUD, approve/reject, learning-summary.
test_credentials: N/A - backend-only testing, no auth required
seed_data_creation: Created test customer XLSTEST* for pipeline tests. Created multiple staging records for testing various flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 207 verified Inventory XLS Pipeline (Phases A+B+C+D). All endpoints working: POST /api/inventory-xls/ingest (multipart), GET/POST staging endpoints, approve/reject, learning-summary. Learning loop verified: first file uses heuristic, second file from same domain uses learned mapping. Forecast files route to inv_incoming_supply. Effective dates extracted from filenames (YYYY-MM-DD and MM.DD.YY formats) are preserved in movements. Test customer created with code starting XLSTEST. 6 learned mappings exist in inv_xls_learned_mappings collection.

ingest_endpoint: POST /api/inventory-xls/ingest with Open Orders XLS - PASS (staged=true, classification=inventory_open_orders, confidence=0.95)
Dedup detection on same file - PASS (already_staged=true)
staging_endpoints: GET /api/inventory-xls/staging/{id} - PASS (returns full record with rows, column_map, classification)
ledger_persistence: Effective date preserved in movements - PASS (2026-05-20T00:00:00+00:00)
forecast_routing: Forecast XLS routes to inv_incoming_supply - PASS (applied_to=inv_incoming_supply, count=3)
learning_loop: First file uses heuristic mapping - PASS
Second file from same domain uses learned mapping - PASS
classifier_behavior: Open Orders filename + headers → classification=inventory_open_orders - PASS
